### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire')

## HexalithEventStoreExtensions Class

Provides extension methods for adding the Hexalith EventStore topology
to an Aspire distributed application\.

```csharp
public static class HexalithEventStoreExtensions
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') → HexalithEventStoreExtensions
### Methods

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string)'></a>

## HexalithEventStoreExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStore\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, string, string, string, int, string, string, string\) Method

Adds the Hexalith EventStore topology to the distributed application builder\.
This configures DAPR state store \(Redis\-backed with actor support\), DAPR pub/sub,
and wires the EventStore and Admin\.Server services with DAPR sidecars\.
Redis is provided externally by `dapr init` at localhost:6379\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources AddHexalithEventStore(this Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource> eventStore, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource>? adminServer, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource>? adminUI=null, string? eventStoreDaprConfigPath=null, string? adminServerDaprConfigPath=null, string? resiliencyConfigPath=null, int eventStoreDaprHttpPort=3501, string? daprPlacementHostAddress=null, string? daprSchedulerHostAddress=null, string? pubSubComponentPath=null);
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).eventStoreDaprConfigPath'></a>

`eventStoreDaprConfigPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Path to the Dapr access control configuration file loaded by the EventStore sidecar\.
This config governs incoming invocations to EventStore\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).adminServerDaprConfigPath'></a>

`adminServerDaprConfigPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Path to the Dapr access control configuration file loaded by the Admin\.Server sidecar\.
This config governs incoming invocations to Admin\.Server\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).resiliencyConfigPath'></a>

`resiliencyConfigPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Absolute path to the DAPR resiliency YAML file \(typically `DaprComponents/resiliency.yaml`\)\.
When provided, the path is injected into the Admin\.Server as the
`AdminServer__ResiliencyConfigPath` environment variable so the resiliency viewer
page \(`/dapr/resiliency`\) can load and display the active policies without requiring
any manual `appsettings.json` entry\. Should be an absolute path produced by the
AppHost's `ResolveDaprConfigPath` helper\. `null` leaves the env var unset and
the resiliency page falls back to its "configuration not available" empty state\.
Note: this env var \(and the localhost\-based `EventStoreDaprHttpEndpoint` /
`TraceUrl` / `MetricsUrl` / `LogsUrl` Aspire\-dashboard URLs\) is only
injected when the AppHost is in \<i\>run mode\</i\>\. In \<i\>publish mode\</i\> \(aspirate,
Aspire publishers\) these are skipped so they do not leak host\-resolved paths or
dashboard URLs into generated K8s ConfigMaps; operators wire the production values
via their kustomize overlay / Helm values / appsettings\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).eventStoreDaprHttpPort'></a>

`eventStoreDaprHttpPort` [System\.Int32](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.int32 'System\.Int32')

DAPR HTTP port for the EventStore sidecar\. Defaults to 3501\. This port MUST be free on the host at
startup — DAPR does not error on port conflicts, it silently binds to a different port, which breaks
cross\-sidecar metadata queries from Admin\.Server\. Override this parameter if 3501 is occupied \(e\.g\.,
by a prior daprd process or another DAPR app\)\. Diagnostic: on Windows, run
`netstat -ano | findstr :3501` before `aspire run`\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).daprPlacementHostAddress'></a>

`daprPlacementHostAddress` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional DAPR placement service address, formatted as `host` or `host:port`\.
Leave `null` to use the DAPR CLI default\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).daprSchedulerHostAddress'></a>

`daprSchedulerHostAddress` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional DAPR scheduler service address, formatted as `host` or `host:port`\.
Leave `null` to use the DAPR CLI default\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,int,string,string,string).pubSubComponentPath'></a>

`pubSubComponentPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional absolute path to a DAPR pub/sub component YAML\. When provided, the `pubsub` component
is sourced from this file \(via `LocalPath`\) instead of being generated, which avoids a
duplicate `pubsub` definition when the same file is also present in a loaded DAPR resources
directory\. `null` generates a default Redis pub/sub component\.

#### Returns
[HexalithEventStoreResources](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreResources')
A [HexalithEventStoreResources](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreResources') containing the resource builders for further customization\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string,string,string,string,int,string,string,string)'></a>

## HexalithEventStoreExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStore\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, string, string, string, string, int, string, string, string\) Method

Adds the Hexalith EventStore topology to the distributed application builder\.
This overload allows the AppHost to provide an isolated DAPR component YAML for
the local state store while preserving the original public overload for consumers\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources AddHexalithEventStore(this Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource> eventStore, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource>? adminServer, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource>? adminUI, string? eventStoreDaprConfigPath, string? adminServerDaprConfigPath, string? resiliencyConfigPath, string? stateStoreComponentPath, int eventStoreDaprHttpPort=3501, string? daprPlacementHostAddress=null, string? daprSchedulerHostAddress=null, string? pubSubComponentPath=null);
```
